top_posts.title: ASMR — Peppin' Ain't Easy
top_posts.message: Turn the sound on for this one. The crisp slice. The airy crumb. The crackle of the crust.
top_posts.note: Highest Facebook reel avg view time this period

patterns: ASMR/texture/sound content is the highest-retention format across all platforms — YouTube ASMR video hit 120%+ avg view % (loop behavior), Facebook ASMR reel topped all reels with 8,274ms avg view time. TikTok ASMR also solid at 1,579 views. Agency should prioritize sound-on content with crust texture closeups.

Relatable humor is the top engagement driver on Facebook and holds well cross-platform — 'You're either the one paying or stocking up' achieved 37.11% Facebook engagement rate (avg is ~8%). Same format hit 4,410 TikTok views with 5.97s avg watch time. More meme-adjacent/relatable content needed.

The Wisco Kid name/brand identity is TikTok gold — 19,505 views (2.5x the next best TikTok) driven purely by the name + humor. Branded pizza names with personality (Wisco Kid, Okie Dokie Artichokie, Curd Your Enthusiasm) are organic content hooks. Agency should lean into flavor name storytelling.

Behind-the-scenes authenticity content consistently overperforms — Photoshoot BTS was #1 Instagram post (14.4% engagement rate, 407 reach) and appeared in top Facebook and TikTok lists too. Origin story / 'three best friends' narrative is a reliable performer.

'Straight From Wisconsin' Meta creative is the top ad — $0.09 CPC with 5.45% CTR at 116,991 impressions. Should receive increased budget allocation vs 'No More Cardboard Crust' which has higher impressions but lower CTR (2.43%) and higher CPC ($0.16).

65+ and 55-64 Meta demographics have the highest CTR (4.28% and 4.08%) and lowest CPC ($0.12 and $0.11) — most efficient audience segments. Older Midwest grocery shoppers respond to quality/real ingredients messaging. Consider creating dedicated creative for this demo.

Instagram core audience is F 35-44 (41.6% of followers) — content about practical dinner solutions and real ingredients aligns with this demographic's priorities. Dinner-solution framing ('dinner handled', 'one less decision') appears in top-performing posts for this demo.

YouTube loops are a signal of highly rewatchable short-form content — both top videos exceed 100% avg view %, indicating shorts-style loop behavior. ASMR and grocery haul formats are driving this. More short, loopable content recommended for YouTube channel.

Branded search on Google converts at extremely high rates — 'real dough pizza company' hit 41.25% CTR, 'real dough pizza' at 31.73%. Branded campaign has 15.35% CTR at $0.16 CPC. Brand awareness from Meta/organic is likely driving branded search volume — integrated funnel is working.

Competitor campaign is least efficient at $0.52 CPC — targeting 'screamin sicilian' queries (32 clicks at $1.27 CPC) is expensive with limited return. Consider reducing competitor budget and reallocating to 'sourdough pizza crust' and 'sourdough frozen pizza' terms which have better efficiency.

Retail expansion posts drive reliable mid-tier organic reach — Woodman's expansion post (267 reach FB), Sendik's store posts on TikTok all performed above average. New retail distribution announcements should always get organic social support across all platforms day-of.
anomalies: Wisco Kid TikTok video at 19,505 views is a 2.5x outlier vs next best — investigate what drove this (timing, sound, hook) and create similar content immediately
Facebook page views on Mar 1 (32,620) and Mar 2 (21,460) are 2-3x higher than rest of month (~10-15K daily) — possible paid boost or viral moment; worth investigating source
YouTube 'Frozen Pizza Grocery Haul' has 126.92% avg view % — highest loop rate in catalog, suggesting extremely strong hook/loop structure worth replicating
TikTok 'Lost in the Sausage' video has 8.48s avg watch time (highest of any TikTok) but only 1,288 views — long watch time with low views suggests potential for boosting this content
recommendations: Create 2-3 more ASMR/texture closeup videos immediately — highest cross-platform retention signal this period
Produce humor reel using the 'you're either X or Y' format for a new pizza flavor or retail drop
Budget shift: increase 'Straight From Wisconsin' creative spend, test new Wisconsin-origin-story variants; reduce Screamin' Sicilian competitor keyword spend
Create a 'Wisco Kid' follow-up TikTok — capitalize on brand name humor before the moment passes
Test 65+ targeted Meta ad set with quality/ingredients-focused creative — highest CTR segment with room for dedicated ad spend
Boost 'Lost in the Sausage' TikTok — 8.48s avg watch time suggests the content has legs but wasn't distributed widely enough
